definitions.text: ISO 639-2 ISO 639-3 language code for Mandingo.

examples: The show is especially popular with middle-aged men.

definitions.text: An adult male who belongs to a particular group: an employee, a representative, etc.
(Should we delete this sense?) Synonym of manly. (Only used in man enough.)
Used to place emphasis upon something or someone; sometimes, but not always, when actually addressing a man.
examples: Man, that was a great catch!

definitions.text: Used to refer to oneself or one's group: I, we; construed in the third person.
You; construed in the third person.
examples: Man thinks I was born yesterday.

definitions.text: To supply (something) with staff or crew (of either sex).
examples: The ship was manned with a small crew.

definitions.text: To take up position in order to operate (something).
To brace (oneself), to fortify or steel (oneself) in a manly way.
A command used to display help pages in Unix and Unix-like operating systems.
